examples: Can we be critical of a person who is born left-handed or dyslexic?
Being dyslexic does not mean that one is unintelligent. Far from it.
Teresa Howarth is dyslexic and was concerned about finding work after being made redundant by Remploy.
The pirate captain Black Stache (Christian Borle), a dyslexic prince of darkness, expertly fits the bill.
